name: DDJ-XP2
description: Sub controller for rekordbox & Serato DJ Pro.

name: Kontrol-F1
description: Dedicated control for Stems and Remix Decks that delivers hands-on, live remixing opportunities.

name: Kontrol-Z1
description: A very compact, two channel no-frills mixer designed especially for Native Instruments’ range of DJ software.

name: Kontrol-X1
description: This controller provides an instant command of your decks and effect parameters.

name: Soundcraft Notepad-8FX
brand: Small-format Analog Mixing Console with USB I/O and Lexicon Effects
description: Get legendary Soundcraft quality. Easily record, edit and playback from your Mac and PC with an integrated USB audio interface—simply plug-and-play. Getting a great mix is easy with a familiar channel strip layout that includes EQ, aux send, master fader level and rotary headphone volume control.

name: S4-MK2
brand: Native Instruments Traktor Kontrol S4 MK2 Controller
description: A portable, 4-channel all-in-one DJ controller perfect for traveling DJs. Offering a user-friendly interface and plug-and-play operation.

name: XDJ-700
description: Comes with a large touchscreen and familiar club layout. Inherits features from the XDJ-1000. Compact size and removable stand offer great setup possibilities.

name: DJM-450
description: Ideal partner for multiplayers. Features Magvel fader, smooth EQ, Sound Colour FX, and Beat FX. 64-bit digital signal processor for warm, high-quality audio.

name: PH12-BT
brand: BST PH12-BT Active PA Speaker 12" Bluetooth 500W
description: Versatile speaker box fitted with top and side-mounted handles for ease of transport. Works with Bluetooth, SD Cards or USBs, or connected through RCA or XLR cables.

name: Kontrol-A25
brand: Native Instruments Komplete streamlined keyboard controller
description: Intuitive pre-programmed control for hundreds of KOMPLETE and NKS plug-ins, plus full VST support. Full integration with MASCHINE, Logic Pro X, GarageBand and Ableton Live, Cubase and Nuendo.

name: Portable Controller Bundle
description: A compact and versatile DJ setup designed for ultimate flexibility. Perfect for on-the-go performance control.

name: Basic Performer Bundle
description: Professional performance in a smaller package. Offering intuitive controls and high-quality sound.

name: Basic Audio Bundle
description: Reliable sound experience for small events. Quick and hassle-free setup.
